title: Sister Sister
overview: A wounded man flees to Hotel Inhumans, where they cater to a certain clientele and the concierges are skilled.

title: Dying Service 1
overview: Kase is a hitman who stays at the hotel when he escapes the life others believe he leads.

title: Dying Service 2
overview: Kase's wound is dire. As his consciousness fades, memories of his wife, and one last request, fill his mind.

title: Corpse Reviver
overview: Nina has been raised to kill. One night, at the hotel bar, she listens to her next target's newest song.

title: Remember Me
overview: A couple arrives at the hotel. As Ikuro offers to take their weapons, Sara stops him for a surprising reason.

title: A Last Supper 2
overview: Sara and Ikuro fight in their own ways for the sake of their guest, Ringo, as her condition quickly worsens.

title: Spider
overview: A reporter who specializes in scandals tails a gunman from a murder scene to a hotel that isn't on any map.

title: Risk Management
overview: An old man claiming to be a regular arrives at the hotel, but his last stay there was twenty years ago!

title: Another Sky 1
overview: Sniper Danica and spotter Chetana are a sought after team, but they first met when Danica was betrayed.

title: Another Sky 2
overview: Chetana has disappeared. Will Danica act to save her, or will she keep the promise they made to each other?

title: Another Sky 3
overview: Chetana finds out that Danica has been forced into a contract. Meanwhile, Danica and Palan prepare for a kill.

title: Another Sky 4
overview: Ikuro and Sara's rescue mission is not without consequences. Later, they return to their duties at the hotel.
